_comment: Allowlist of authors that are always treated as trusted. Phase 1 (live author lookup) is skipped for these; their 'about' and credibility are taken from here. Match is case-insensitive against 'name', any 'aliases', or the 'github' owner/URL found in the skill's metadata.author. Add an entry to vouch for an author.

trusted_authors.name: jovd83
trusted_authors.about: Maintainer of 60+ hand-authored AgentSkills under a strict bootstrapper template (validate.yml CI on push/PR, Keep-a-Changelog, MIT, version+author metadata). Test Manager / AI Architect (Smals). Dispatcher-first, gate-driven workflow.

trusted_authors.name: anthropic
trusted_authors.about: Vendor of Claude and the Agent Skills / Claude Code tooling. First-party skills.
